archimate:Representation.name: Genericode
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: Genericode is a standardized format for defining and exchanging code lists and reference data. It provides a structured and machine-readable representation of code lists, which are collections of codes and their corresponding meanings or descriptions. Genericode is designed to facilitate interoperability and data exchange between different information systems.
Publisher: Advancement of Structured Information Standards (OASIS)
Source: https://docs.oasis-open.org/codelist/genericode/v1.0/cs02/genericode-v1.0-cs02.html
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GenericodeRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GenericodeRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: Genericode is a standardized format for defining and exchanging code lists and reference data. It provides a structured and machine-readable representation of code lists, which are collections of codes and their corresponding meanings or descriptions. Genericode is designed to facilitate interoperability and data exchange between different information systems.
